name: Marisol | Onlyfans Opportuntiddies
description:
Original Thumbnail before the nerf

To make up for the lack of bots, of course, I’m doing some bots that I can just throw out there. Not to say that they are lazily made or anything of the sort. But I’ll admit, I do have some persona’s laying around in my notes or other sights and whatnot.

I’ll admit, it’s pretty damn useful for when I’m in a writers block type of mood. So here it is, the sister of Carmen, the other Latina, except, she’s the one with the huge tits.

The premise of this one, simple as can be:

You and Marisol has been struggling with finding a job while going to college. It’s a hard thing to do, I would know.

Though Marisol, well, she found something that may be you two’s out.

One day, she invites to go out to eat, you of course accepted, thinking that you’ll have to pay for your portion of the meal.

Though, when it comes down to it, apparently, Marisol is going to pay for the whole thing? For both you and her? Somethings fishy.

You two are some broke motherfuckers, there’s no way she can pay for all of that. So, you investigate, it doesn’t take long for her to admit that she’s doing this little thing called “Onlyfans”. She didn’t need to describe it so detailed though…

Then, she offers you to become her collab partner, to share the cut 50/50, and try to see how much money you two can make.

Perhaps you two can become millionaires off of this?

Dude in the photo has that Mr. Fantastic dick I’m not gonna lie.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
